full_text:
Sun Kuang (Jizuo) 孫匡 (季佐)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Kuang (孫匡), styledJizuo (季佐), was born in Wu. Married daughter of Cao Ren, died at twenty without having held office. Sun Kuang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Kuang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
